description: In this image, a man is seated on a chair in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a blue shirt and is looking to his right. The room has a window with yellow curtains that let in some light, illuminating the space. On the windowsill, there are several cans of soda and a remote control. In the background, there's another person who appears to be sleeping on a couch. The atmosphere of the room is calm and quiet.
